title: Down to Their Last Yacht
overview: Left only with their yacht after going broke in the Great Depression, a high-society family sets sail for the South Seas. Screwball comedy, with songs.

trailers.title: Felix Knight croons "Malakamokalu" in DOWN TO THEIR LAST YACHT (1934)
